title: Mirage: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
summary: Mirage is a video world modeling approach that stores static scene content as 3D latent tokens and reads or updates this cache during generation, avoiding the inefficient RGB render-and-reencode loop used in prior point-cloud memory approaches. The method achieves 10.57x faster generation and 55x lower 3D cache memory usage, with a 70.36 WorldScore average.
